texto: I love all kinds of movies. I love a really good comedy and not the cheesy ones. My parents hate this, but I love horror films. Those are my favorite, and of course, dramatic roles. I'm really drawn to those as well. All different genres.
explicacao: Citação de Liana Liberato sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I love all kinds of movies. I love a really good comedy and not the cheesy ones. My parents hate …” articula amor, love, good em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como good e parents.

frase_original: I love all kinds of movies. I love a really good comedy and not the cheesy ones. My parents hate this, but I love horror films. Those are my favorite, and of course, dramatic roles. I'm really drawn to those as well. All different genres.
